chapter.markdown:
# Risk Intelligence

**Summary:** 4 alert types analyzed. 6 flagged alert(s) parsed. 5 suspicious user(s) highlighted.
**Source document:** 每日风控总结 - 2026-03-31 00:00 - 23:59

## Suspicious Users
- 193160760480899072 — T1 — Trade/equity ratio 9,693,821,605x. Active on: ZBT-USDT-SWAP.
- 158905236868734976 — T1 — Trade/equity ratio 1,068,470,260x. Active on: ZBT-USDT-SWAP.
- 124856668386373632 — T1 — Trade/equity ratio 482,999,337x. Active on: ZBT-USDT-SWAP.
- 177125650799403008 — T1 — Trade/equity ratio 2,188,294x. Active on: ZBT-USDT-SWAP.
- 147349815574044672 — T1 — Trade/equity ratio 503,528x. Active on: ZBT-USDT-SWAP.

## Deep Profiles
- 193160760480899072 — T1 — China account (okx_cn). registered 2021-06-22 (4.8yr). trade/equity ratio 9,693,821,605x.
- 158905236868734976 — T1 — China account (okx_cn). registered 2021-03-19 (5.0yr). trade/equity ratio 1,068,470,260x.
- 124856668386373632 — T1 — China account (okx_cn). registered 2020-12-15 (5.3yr). trade/equity ratio 482,999,337x.
- 177125650799403008 — T1 — China account (okx_cn). registered 2021-05-09 (4.9yr). trade/equity ratio 2,188,294x.
- 147349815574044672 — T1 — China account (okx_cn). registered 2021-02-15 (5.1yr). trade/equity ratio 503,528x.
